Back to Conference Notebook

Botify · Live Notebook

Botify Connect US 2024

October 2024 AustinAttendedOfficial site

An invite-only one-day enterprise SEO summit in Austin, TX. Eleven sessions across the AI/search stack: from PhD-level reasoning models, to RAG, to AI Overviews, to migrations and the C-suite conversation. Attended in person — these are my notes.

Days1
Sessions11
Speakers10
Hours8
Agenda Browse Speakers · 10

Agenda · 4-Day Timeline

Jump to

Tuesday, October 1, 2024

Connect US 2024

Eleven back-to-back sessions on generative AI, search, customer experience, migrations, and the C-suite conversation. The through-line: act now, automate everything, and stop optimizing for keywords.

9:00 AM

9:45 AM

keynote

From Evolution to Revolution: The Role of Generative AI in Life & Search

A.J. Ghergich

VP Consulting Services, Botify

We've leapt to Level 4 PhD-reasoning AI faster than the industry predicted. Brands that wait will be steamrolled — empowerment over doom.

  • →Act now — inaction is the real risk
  • →Customer intent hasn't changed; only the interfaces did
  • →AI is happening because of us — we direct it
My Notes

Notes will appear here once published.

Open session

9:45 AM

10:15 AM

talk

Traditional vs Gen AI Search: Everything You Need to Know

Dalton Finney

Solutions Engineer, Botify

Bing's index quietly powers ChatGPT and Copilot. Optimize for it. RAG closes the freshness gap; structured data is the entry fee.

  • →Bing's index = the new SEO surface (powers ChatGPT + Copilot)
  • →RAG = LLM + live search index for real-time answers
  • →Structured data + content automation are non-negotiable
My Notes

Notes will appear here once published.

Open session

10:15 AM

11:00 AM

panel

The Inside Perspective on Modern Search

Fabrice Canel

Principal Product Manager, Bing

Inside view from Bing on how AI rewrites search engines. Co-paneled with Adrien Ménard (Botify).

  • →Conversational queries replace fragmented keyword strings
  • →Crawlability + structured data still decide who AI cites
  • →Automate content freshness — sitemaps, IndexNow, APIs
My Notes

Notes will appear here once published.

Open session

11:00 AM

11:45 AM

panel

Speed Ahead to Stay Ahead: Brand Success Strategies & the Power of Automation

Anthony Cantelmo

Director, Search & Content, Discount Tire

Panel with Rick Egan (Beyond), Cody Exter (Botify), Federico Rodriguez (Best Buy), Cody Walker (Maui Jim), Adrien Ménard (Botify). Real-world automation case studies.

  • →Indexation: 6-month crawl → 60 days with dynamic XML sitemaps
  • →AI-written page titles lifted CTR (Best Buy)
  • →Suppress paid ads when organic owns the SERP
My Notes

Notes will appear here once published.

Open session

11:45 AM

12:30 PM

talk

Protect Today's Progress & Prepare for Tomorrow with Botify

Christophe Frenet

VP Product, Botify

Co-presented with Rebecca Zabow. Bot-traffic intelligence: measure what AI bots actually consume, then push the right content to the right index.

  • →Track which AI bots hit your site + how often
  • →Push content directly to AI indexes (don't wait to be crawled)
  • →AI-generated titles + A/B test before full rollout
My Notes

Notes will appear here once published.

Open session

1:30 PM

2:15 PM

panel

Beyond Search: How Customer Experience Is Adapting

Greg Coleman

Chief Strategy Officer

With Lauri Joffe (American Freight) + Noam Paransky (Tapestry). Gen Z's search behavior is bifurcating — social/visual win the brand-discovery moment.

  • →Gen Z: only 64% use traditional search (vs 94% older)
  • →Visual search + TikTok = brand discovery for younger cohorts
  • →Four-part exec framework: cost · revenue · enabling tech · fear
My Notes

Notes will appear here once published.

Open session

2:15 PM

3:00 PM

panel

The Power of Organic: How Organizations Use Search as a Strength

Charley Hackerson

Senior Director, Customer Strategy, Botify

With Jason Mandragona (NBCU News) + Abishek Surana Rajendra (Course Hero). Building cross-functional SEO culture + in-house A/B testing.

  • →In-house SEO A/B testing platform → exec credibility
  • →Quality-scored content beats volume
  • →Educate other teams — distribute SEO ownership
My Notes

Notes will appear here once published.

Open session

3:00 PM

3:45 PM

panel

Successful Site Migrations: Automation, Advice, & Future-Proofing Your Site

Zach Chahalis

SEO Lead, Apartments.com

With Jordan Long (Botify), Dave Marks (Recurrent), Sharanya Srinivasan (Care.com), Cody Walker (Maui Jim), Adrien Ménard (Botify). Migration war stories.

  • →Bring SEO in on day one — not at QA
  • →Automation handles the boring 90% of QA
  • →Comprehensive checklists are not optional
My Notes

Notes will appear here once published.

Open session

3:45 PM

4:30 PM

panel

Uniting Search, SEOs, & the C-Suite

Krista Dalton

Director of SEO, Tecovas

With Chris Long (GoFish), Praneet Nigam (Signet), Jacque Urick (Realtor.com), Cody Walker (Maui Jim), Adrien Ménard. How to talk to executives about SEO.

  • →Translate SEO into customer-experience metaphors
  • →SEO is not free — surface the real investment
  • →Pre-empt the AI question, don't dodge it
My Notes

Notes will appear here once published.

Open session

4:30 PM

5:00 PM

talk

How Google's AI Overviews Are Changing Consumer Behaviors

Ray Grieselhuber

Founder & CEO, DemandSphere

With Tim Resnik (Botify) + Abishek Surana Rajendra (Course Hero). New SERP metrics: pixel depth, visual rankings, cosine similarity.

  • →75% of AI Overview links come from top-12 organic
  • →Track pixel depth, not just rank
  • →Long-tail informational queries drive AIO frequency
My Notes

Notes will appear here once published.

Open session

5:00 PM

5:45 PM

keynote

Predictions for Search & How to Prepare Today

A.J. Ghergich

VP Consulting Services, Botify

Closing keynote with Adrien Ménard, Abishek Surana Rajendra, Frank Vitovitch (Botify). Bold predictions: AGI, AI bot traffic governance, the death of keyword-driven SEO.

  • →Share of voice + brand mentions > keyword rankings
  • →AI bots will outnumber human visitors — govern accordingly
  • →AGI is closer than the industry admits
My Notes

Notes will appear here once published.
